Thank you for contributing. The maintainer is solo + hardware-bound; the
fields below help triage your PR without back-and-forth.

## What this PR changes

## Why

## How I tested

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm build:all` passes locally
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the changed surface
- [ ] If route `@openapi` JSDoc changed: ran `pnpm docs` and committed regenerated `openapi.json` in this PR

**Hardware touched (if any):**
<!-- e.g. "real Altair 8800 over /dev/ttyUSB0 at 230400, on a Pi 4" or "mocks only" -->

**Browser smoke-tested (if frontend touched):**
<!-- e.g. "Safari 17.x, Chrome 125, both themes" -->

## Anything to watch for

<!-- Risk, follow-ups, deferred work, known-acceptable regressions. -->
